prestazioni: Replace the stock 327ci (5.4L) small-block V8 (engine code: L75/L76/L79) with a fully built L76-based stroker kit featuring a 4.125" forged crankshaft (Callies Compstar), 6.000" H-beam connecting rods (Eagle Specialty Products), and forged aluminum pistons (JE 2618 alloy) for a final displacement of 383ci (6.3L). Pair with a custom-ground Comp Cams hydraulic roller camshaft (242/248 duration @ 0.050", 0.600" lift) and port-matched Edelbrock Performer RPM cylinder heads (2.02" intake/1.60" exhaust valves, 64cc combustion chambers).

Install a Holley Sniper EFI 2x4 throttle-body injection system with dual-plane intake manifold (Holley 300-36) and MSD Pro-Billet distributor (85551) for precise ignition timing control. Pair with a custom 3" stainless steel exhaust system (Stainless Works) featuring 1.75" primary tubes, 3.5" collectors, and Borla Pro XS mufflers (40254) for optimized scavenging without drone.

Upgrade the suspension with a full Global West Stage 3 kit (front: tubular control arms with Del-A-Lum bushings, 1.25" drop spindles; rear: multi-link trailing arms with polyurethane bushings) and Koni Classic adjustable shocks (80-1967SPORT). Add a Detroit Speed front sway bar (080301) and Hotchkis rear sway bar (15120) to reduce body roll. Use Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (225/50ZR15 front, 275/40ZR15 rear) on 15x8" and 15x10" American Racing Torq-Thrust II wheels (ET25 offset).
estetica: Apply a custom-mixed PPG Deltron DBC basecoat in "1965 Corvette Nassau Blue" (code: 9006) with a high-gloss clearcoat (PPG 2021) for a factory-correct but show-quality finish. Add subtle ghost flames (House of Kolor Shimrin2) along the rocker panels and rear quarters for a period-correct hot rod touch.

Replace the stock bumpers with a full front/rear bolt-on steel replica kit (Corvette Central 63-67) featuring polished stainless steel trim and integrated LED turn signals (United Pacific 23405). Install a custom-fabricated hood scoop (Fiberglass Trends) with a functional ram-air induction system routed to the Holley Sniper EFI.

Retrofit the interior with a full custom upholstery kit (Hampton Coach) in black Nappa leather with blue Alcantara inserts (matching Nassau Blue). Add a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) on a NRG Innovations quick-release hub, and install a full digital gauge cluster (Dakota Digital RTX) with analog-style faces and programmable shift lights. Replace the stock seats with Corbeau GTS II recliners (with 4-point harnesses) and add sound deadening (Dynamat Xtreme) to the floors and firewall.
